title: AKH® Easter Paper Cups | Pack of 8 | 9oz Disposable Party Cups | Bunny & Egg Design | Easter Themed Tableware for Kids & Adults | Perfect for Party, Spring Celebrations & Gatherings
features: Dimensions & Material: Each cup holds 9oz(270ml) of liquid and is made from premium-quality, eco-friendly paper, ensuring durability for both hot and cold beverages. Ideal for kids and adults alike!
Product Specifications: This pack includes 8 cups featuring charming Easter-themed designs, including Easter bunnies, eggs, and spring motifs. Perfectly sized for any drink, from juice to punch.
Perfect for Easter Parties: Use these festive cups for Easter gatherings, spring picnics, birthday parties, or family celebrations. Their bright, cheerful design adds a fun touch to your tableware!
Eco-Friendly & Disposable: Made from biodegradable materials, these cups are disposable, making cleanup a breeze after your celebrations, while still being kind to the environment.
Versatile & Fun: These cups are not just for Easter! They can also be used for garden parties, tea parties, or any spring-themed event, adding vibrant colour and charm to your celebration.
description: Add a touch of festive charm to your Easter celebrations with these premium 9oz Easter paper cups. Featuring delightful spring-themed designs with bunnies, Easter eggs, and vibrant colours, these eco-friendly cups are perfect for serving drinks at your Easter parties, picnics, or family gatherings. Made from high-quality, biodegradable paper, they offer durability for both hot and cold beverages while being disposable for easy cleanup. Whether hosting a birthday, tea party, or spring event, these cups are an ideal choice to brighten up your tableware and add a fun, eco-conscious touch to your festivities.
